description: Initial screen state: The Askable Sessions page is visible with a dark background and instructions for the user to share their window to begin the session.
frame_description: A dark screen with centered white text instructions. A small video feed of the participant is visible in the top right corner.

description: The instructional text on the page updates, presenting the user with the specific research task: planning a holiday to London from the Sunshine Coast.
frame_description: The central text on the dark background updates line-by-line to show the full task description.

description: A button labeled 'Open' with an external link icon appears at the bottom of the instruction text.
frame_description: A circular button with an 'Open' label and an external link icon appears below the task description text.

description: The user clicks the 'Open' button to proceed to the task website.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button at the moment of the click, which triggers a state change in the button.

description: The browser opens a new tab and navigates to the Google homepage.
frame_description: The browser switches to a new tab, which initially shows 'Untitled' and then loads the Google search page content.

description: The Google homepage is fully loaded and displayed.
frame_description: The standard Google homepage layout is visible, including the logo, search bar, and action buttons.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the Google search input field.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the main search bar on the Google homepage.

description: The user clicks inside the Google search bar.
frame_description: The cursor is inside the search bar, and the focus state is activated.

description: Upon clicking the search bar, a dropdown menu appears showing 'Trending searches'.
frame_description: A dropdown menu is visible below the search bar, listing various trending search terms.

description: User clicks the 'I only need accommodation for part of my trip' checkbox.
interaction_target: I only need accommodation for part of my trip
page_title: Travel: Holidays, Cheap Flights, Hotels & Packages | Expedia
frame_description: Expedia homepage, Packages tab, with search fields for flights and hotels.

description: New date input fields for accommodation appear below the checkbox.
frame_description: Expedia search form with expanded date fields for partial accommodation.

description: User hovers over the 'Search' button.
frame_description: Expedia search form with cursor over the Search button.

description: Page navigates from the homepage to the search results page.

frame_description: Loading screen with Expedia logo, followed by the hotel search results page.

description: User scrolls down the hotel search results page.

description: User scrolls down the filter sidebar on the left.

description: User selects the 'Very good 8+' guest rating filter.

description: Hotel search results refresh and load new content based on the guest rating filter.
